purpose: Local/CI transport fixture only. It is not Moka evidence and does not assert production semantics or G1 finality.

money.providerRepresentation: decimal major-unit string with dot separator

categories.success: Clean synchronous result; query returns the same terminal result.
categories.decline: Definitive declined result; query returns the same terminal result.
categories.duplicate: A second initiate using the same OtherTrxCode returns the original identity/result and never creates a second record.
categories.not_found: Query explicitly reports no record for OtherTrxCode.
categories.timeout: Initiate closes or delays the response; no terminal outcome is inferred from transport failure.
categories.malformed_sanitized_error: A malformed body or unsafe upstream-like message is emitted only by the emulator and must map to a stable sanitized category.
categories.late_query_resolution: Timeout-created state is queryable as unresolved before the configured query count and terminal afterward.

unknown: Pool status/finality representation and settlement truth.
Pool approve/query request and response semantics beyond the point-in-time research.
Pooled-unapproved void/refund behavior, holding duration and automatic expiry.
3D redirect hash verification and any server-to-server callback.
Test hostname discrepancy and production endpoint behavior.
